'''lazïftïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yoak|yoak]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-z-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yoak|yoak]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| lazïftïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || læzïftïfth || læzïftïfj || læzïftïfsh || læzïftïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || lazïfzïftïfth || lazïfzïftïfj || lazïfzïftïfsh || lazïfzïftïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || lazïftïfth || lazïftïfj || lazïftïfsh || lazïftïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || lazïfftïffth || lazïfftïffj || lazïfftïffsh || lazïfftïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || lazïftïfïf || lazïftïfïf || lazïftïfïf || lazïftïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || lazïftïfth || lazïftïfj || lazïftïfsh || lazïftïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || lazïftïfïfl || lazïftïfïfl || lazïftïfïfl || lazïftïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || lazïftïfïfïf || lazïftïfïfïf || lazïftïfïfïf || lazïftïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || lazïftïfïfn || lazïftïfïfn || lazïftïfïfn || lazïftïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || lazïftïfïforo || lazïftïfïforo || lazïftïfïforo || lazïftïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
